title: Container Queries
description: Use container queries to make a card component adapt its layout based on the container width, not the viewport
html:
Card Title

Card description that adapts to container width.
starterCss:
/* Make the card layout adapt based on container width:
   - Define the wrapper as a container
   - Below 400px: stack image above content
   - Above 400px: image beside content (horizontal layout)
   - Image: 100% wide when stacked, 200px when horizontal */

validationRules.message: The wrapper should be a size container (container-type: inline-size)
The card should clip overflow for rounded corners

hints.text: Container queries respond to the size of a parent container, not the viewport. You need to define a containment context first.
Set 'container-type: inline-size' on the wrapper. Use @container (min-width: 400px) to change flex-direction to row.
Define container-type on parent, use @container query to switch from column to row layout at 400px.
